scenario_title: tracking completion of pre-operative safety checks
scenario_description: Surgery Checklists: tracking completion of pre-operative safety checks

turns.text: Here's a pre-op checklist board from the OR. Can you see how many items have been completed so far?
turns.image_description: A sterile operating room with a checklist board showing 10 items, 3 crossed off (equipment sterilization, anesthesia verification, surgical site marking). LED lights illuminate the board, no other objects visible.

turns.text: I see three items marked as completed: equipment sterilization, anesthesia verification, and surgical site marking. Are there any other updates to report?
I just observed two more items being checked off. Here's the updated board.
turns.image_description: Same board with 2 new items crossed off (patient consent form, antibiotic prophylaxis). A nurse's hand briefly visible in the background, unrelated to checklist.

turns.text: I see two additional items completed: patient consent form and antibiotic prophylaxis. That brings the total to five. Have there been any more updates?
There are three more items completed now. Take a look at this image.
turns.image_description: Board now shows 3 more items crossed off (IV access, surgical gowning, fire extinguisher check). A red emergency light flickers in the corner, unrelated to checklist.

turns.text: I see three new completions: IV access, surgical gowning, and fire extinguisher check. The emergency light in the background doesn't seem to affect the checklist status. Are there any final updates?
Here's the final checklist status. How many items have been completed now?
turns.image_description: Final checklist with all 10 items crossed off. A surgeon's gloved hand is visible, holding a scalpel, unrelated to checklist.

turns.text:
How many pre-operative safety checklist items were completed in the final image?

C) 10
A) 3
B) 5
D) 8

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established 3 completed items. Turn 2 added 2 more (total 5). Turn 3 added 3 more (total 8). Turn 4 confirmed all 10 items were completed, with visual distractors (nurse's hand, emergency light, surgeon's hand) explicitly ignored as unrelated to the checklist status.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: Only by observing incremental additions can the model track the full 10-item completion, as a single image would show all marks simultaneously.

_meta.scenario: Surgery Checklists: tracking completion of pre-operative safety checks
